channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: At least a dozen crypto entities attacked since Drift Protocol hack
item.description: Rhea Finance and the Russia-linked Grinex exchange were hacked for a combined $21 million over the past two days.

item.title: The U.S. government moves $606,000 in bitcoin linked to the 2016 Bitfinex hack to Coinbase
item.description: Bitfinex plans to use the returned coins to redeem all Recovery Right Tokens and devote at least 80 percent of remaining net proceeds to repurchasing and burning its UNUS SED LEO token.

item.title: XRP leads bitcoin and ether on weekly gains, but muted volume keeps breakout in check
item.description: Token outperforms bitcoin and ether over seven days, though thinning participation signals consolidation rather than conviction.

item.title: Bitcoin bulls target $125,000 as U.S.-Iran peace talks trigger risk-on mood
item.description: Funding rates at 2023 lows signal the market is heavily short against bitcoin, ZeroStack's Daniel Reis-Faria says, setting up conditions for a forced unwind if prices push higher.

item.title: Zanzibar police probe crypto exec Joe McCann after fiancée’s death
item.description: Zanzibar police are reportedly holding Asymmetric founder Joe McCann for questioning after the death of his fiancée, Ashly Robinson.

item.title: Russia-linked crypto exchange Grinex halts trading after $14M hack
item.description: Grinex has been accused by US authorities of assisting Russia and other entities in evading sanctions and laundering funds for Russia-linked hackers.

item.title: Ex-Treasury chief warns of US bond crash, calls for contingency plan
item.description: “When we hit it, it will be vicious, so we have to prepare for that eventuality,” said former Treasury Secretary Henry Paulson on a potential US Treasury market crisis.

item.title: Three things Bitcoin must do to hold highs above $76K: Analysts
item.description: Analysts say reclaiming $76,000, sustained spot market buy volume and consistent inflows to the Bitcoin ETFs are the necessary components required for a rally to new highs.

item.title: Stablecoin issuer Circle faces lawsuit over $280M Drift Protocol hack
item.description: Circle was accused of aiding and abetting the conversion of the stolen funds and negligence after it did not freeze funds stolen from the Drift Protocol in April.

item.title: 🔥 BIG: Tennessee's Strategic Bitcoin Reserve Act is set for a Senate Finance Committee hearing on April 20, moving one step closer to potentially becoming law. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE9hNnBPSWN0T3VpS0dONWxrSjB0T053VEVZUUhzNW9qQXFPZjRwanBQSFVQOGY4MG5FcE1NUW5NN2h4RHBaOS1EclZJYXR3QWhsRUp1S2JPZURFektleEtUS1lPek8?oc=5" target="_blank">🔥 BIG: Tennessee's Strategic B…

item.title: THE US GOVERNMENT IS SELLING BITCOIN The US Government just moved $606.47K to Coinbase Prime. This BTC was seized from the Bitfinex Hacker Ilya Lichtenstein. Will they sell the stolen BTC on Coinbase? - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTFBiWGdSU3NzMnI3RFJfQTlSSVdBQkhwQW9XUndzbEZvYWRyUGh3NnpvdVVTS1F4Z3Mta2JFXzUyQ2JLYmRCR2U3bENld1c3RlZyU3Uxdmh6WDRleTA?oc=5" target="_blank">THE US GOVERNMENT IS SELLING BITCOIN The US…

item.title: Bitcoin eyes $90K as whales absorb 20x daily BTC supply in 30 days
item.description: Bitcoin price has entered the breakout stage of a classic bullish reversal pattern and is now eyeing a run toward $90,000.

item.title: Bitcoin liquidations top $283M after short squeeze sends BTC price above $75K
item.description: Bitcoin consolidates between $73,000 and $75,000 as liquidations trigger a short squeeze, but weak spot demand keeps the upside momentum in check.

item.title: Bitcoin funding rate stays negative even as BTC price trades above $75K: What gives?
item.description: Bitcoin’s futures funding rate has remained negative even as BTC bounced back above $75,000. Should traders be worried?

item.title: Quantum Proposal Won’t Save Satoshi’s Bitcoin, Says Cardano Founder Hoskinson
item.description: Cardano founder Charles Hoskinson says "it's not possible" to save all vulnerable Bitcoin from quantum computing under the current proposal.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Key Ethereum researcher Josh Stark leaves the Ethereum Foundation
item.description: Stark's departure from the Ethereum Foundation is the most high-profile exit from the organization since its shakeup in the first quarter of 2025.

item.title: Ethereum Foundation Helps Expose North Korean Workers That Infiltrated Crypto Firms
item.description: The Ethereum Foundation reported that a six-month program helped expose around 100 DPRK IT workers across 53 crypto projects.

item.title: After Kalshi appeal, prediction markets fight could head to US Supreme Court
item.description: An appellate court is expected to reach a decision after hearing arguments from Kalshi and lawyers representing the state of Nevada.

item.title: OpenAI Super App Takes Shape: Codex Gets Computer Use, Browser, and Image Gen
item.description: OpenAI's Codex desktop app now controls your Mac, runs its own browser, and generates images. The update pushes Codex further into territory occupied by Claude Code and OpenClaw.

item.title: BITCOIN HAS WON OVER WALLSTREET In just 6 months, BofA recommended ETFs, Morgan Stanley launched its own $BTC ETF, and Goldman Sachs filed for one. This is how adoption accelerates. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE5ubFdjMkJ1Wk1HSmMxMXNHOVZTczRfMTJsd0M0dmxkMGFudHdVd2toczFwMlctYVZTb09lN2w5Y1NWczEwczhlbmVnZnMxc0FfUnlqSjg2UFY3dGI5Y0dwRnJzUWxmZw?oc=5" target="_blank">BITCOIN HAS WON OVER WALLSTR…

item.title: Russian Crypto Exchange Grinex Halts Trading, Alleging $13M Exploit by 'Western Special Services'
item.description: Russian crypto exchange Grinex paused trading services after a $13 million exploit it says was conducted by "foreign special services."

item.title: HIVE plans $75M raise to fund AI infrastructure push
item.description: The Bitcoin miner will use the proceeds to expand GPU capacity and data centers as it scales its high-performance computing business beyond mining.

item.title: Federal AI Use Soars, But Bottlenecks Threaten Momentum Amid Public Skepticism: Brookings
item.description: The United States government has rapidly adopted AI tools in recent years, but skepticism towards both AI and agencies alike is only growing.

item.title: Dear Crypto, It took us 4 years to admit the hard truth: tokens don’t make sense and value enabled by blockchains accrues to equities. We built @artemis in 2022 to bring fundamentals to crypto. We succeeded spectacularly. The best liquid token funds use Arte - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTE5TWXhwY1plaWZ2MEhtZnJiUnViZVloaXppeTR4UXpFaFVKMlQtUHI3WmI4V1ctYUpBcHRWa0d3cTRQdHZIZU1YOWhOMUtjb3ViQ3FHYWQ1TVlYLXM?oc=5" target="_blank">Dear Crypto, It took us 4 years to admit th…

item.title: 🚨 UPDATE: Bitcoin funding rates hit historically low levels often seen at market bottoms, with heavy short positioning raising the risk of a potential short squeeze. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE9yQkJfSWtZcGJSTm5wMDdqQnMyZXk3YU56V0JXVnFkNmZIX0tCU21VdVVNN1l6MHc2ZE5vVUlwMm9Obm1JNTBxcjdHMEZzR29fNjVpbDdJWFc1NTZmMC0tV2otNFQ?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨 UPDATE: Bitcoin funding rate…

item.title: Suspicious Polymarket Trader Made $320K on Last-Minute 2025 Biden Pardons
item.description: Two linked wallets flawlessly bet on several pardons made by former President Joe Biden during his final minutes in office.

item.title: Public crypto miners sold more BTC in Q1 2026 than all of 2025: Report
item.description: Mining companies are now split between those liquidating Bitcoin to cover operating expenses and those holding their BTC in reserve to fuel future growth.

item.title: Your AI Chats Can Be Used Against You in Court—Law Firms Are Scrambling
item.description: Two months after a New York federal judge ruled AI conversations can be seized by prosecutors, more than a dozen major law firms have issued warnings to clients.

item.title: Bitcoin analysts see ‘further upside,’ and identify next price levels to watch
item.description: Traders say Bitcoin has room to rally higher, but the upside could be capped at BTC’s active supply cost basis near $78,000.

item.title: With no bipartisan leadership, CFTC won't ‘slow down‘ on rulemaking
item.description: Democratic lawmakers called out Michael Selig for unilaterally advancing policies at the regulator that's normally led by a bipartisan group of five commissioners.

item.title: Stack BTC CEO Steps Down as Farage-Linked Bitcoin Venture Reshuffles Leadership
item.description: Reform UK leader Nigel Farage announced his backing of the company following its relaunch under the Stack BTC name in March.

item.title: Claude Opus 4.7 Is Here: Anthropic’s Latest Model Delivers, But It’s a Token Eating Machine
item.description: Anthropic's new flagship model beat every benchmark we threw at it, eats tokens like a hungry teenager, and showed its reasoning out loud.

item.title: Charles Schwab Weighs Prediction Markets Move as Bitcoin, Ethereum Trading Nears
item.description: Charles Schwab President and CEO Rick Wurster indicated that America’s largest discount brokerage will likely support prediction markets.

item.title: Charles Schwab to roll out spot Bitcoin, Ether trading for retail clients
item.description: Schwab will introduce direct trading in the two biggest cryptos through a dedicated account, its first move into spot trading as it expands its digital asset offerings.

item.title: CFTC Chair Mike Selig Faces Bipartisan Pushback on Prediction Markets, Hyperliquid Perps
item.description: Sports and war prediction markets and crypto-backed perpetual futures came under fire during a House committee hearing Thursday.

item.title: Bitcoin bull run ‘still too early’ to call as demand lags exiting capital: Analyst
item.description: Bitcoin trades below the profitability threshold for active holders, with early signs of BTC demand offering limited price support for now.

item.title: U.S. CFTC's Selig says AI has helped make up for staffing cuts at key crypto watchdog
item.description: Chairman Mike Selig faces explosive new market duties with crypto and prediction markets, where he said "numerous investigations" have begun.

item.title: Meta Hikes Quest VR Prices Following PS5 Bump as RAM Shortage Rocks Tech World
item.description: The global RAM shortage claims another victim, with Meta boosting Quest 3 and Quest 3S prices following other gadget price hikes.

item.title: Cardano's Charles Hoskinson says Bitcoin's quantum fix is a hard fork that can't save Satoshi's coins
item.description: The Cardano founder argues BIP-361 is mislabeled as a soft fork and that its zero-knowledge recovery plan cannot rescue roughly 1.7 million pre-2013 bitcoin, including Satoshi's holdings.

item.title: Bitcoin rebounds near $74.5K as US stocks chase after new all-time highs
item.description: Bitcoin attempted to recover the $75,000 level as US stocks chase after a second day of fresh all-time highs. Is the bull market back on?

item.title: THE NEXT FED CHAIR OWNS BITCOIN. Kevin Warsh — Trump’s pick to replace Jerome Powell — just disclosed that he owns BTC. He’s called Bitcoin “an important asset” and “a very good policeman for policy.” Confirmation hearing: next week. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTFB0T2lvczN1WkFqSjNrSVRJWERBdWhTYm90anNONlJGdjZwWDBoeE9idmdkUWpQcTRMakRScjVaWXFrenV5YWxuSGRLeWZaa21TZmxJVjNkcjh2VlFxYzRDcW15UkQxZw?oc=5" target="_blank">THE NEXT FED CHAIR OWNS BITC…

item.title: Drift Taps Tether for $148 Million Recovery Plan, Ditches Circle's USDC Following DeFi Exploit
item.description: Circle has faced pushback online for standing pat as actors used its cross-chain protocol to move stolen funds.

item.title: Zonda exchange says 4.5K BTC wallet inaccessible amid withdrawal crisis
item.description: The CEO of the troubled Zonda exchange has disclosed a Bitcoin wallet holding around 4,500 BTC, but said the private keys were never transferred during a company handover.

item.title: Big news. Def better deal than most crypto exchanges for newbies but IMO it’s tough sell vs ETFs (which are 2bps to buy vs 75bps for Schwab direct). That said ETFs have ann exp ratio vs none buying direct. Bottom line: if you buy btc one time and one time onl - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTFBja20zWFZfcU9xZVc3Rk9xTFY2bU5ERy1pRWJmSzRWREl3YndXa2dhbnN3UTRIQ21PeDQzcjgtZGVqRU4zdkJtemY4YjlHQkhJX3ZLVnFTUG5FRVRuZVRvd2pidFg?oc=5" target="_blank">Big news. Def better deal than …

item.title: Polkadot-Ethereum Bridge Hack Losses Were 10x Worse Than Reported, Team Admits
item.description: Polkadot bridge protocol Hyperbridge said losses from this week's hack were 10x worse than originally reported, tallying about $2.5 million.

item.title: Crypto for Advisors: Tokenization’s evolution
item.description: Tokenized assets are moving from concept to portfolio allocation. Learn how compliance architecture and institutional movement are redefining risk and opportunity for advisors.

item.title: Bitcoin slides back below $74,000 as breakout to higher levels fails again
item.description: The $75,000-$76,000 range has proven to be stiff resistance as bitcoin attempts to claw back this year's losses.

item.title: French Police Rescue Mother and Child After $400K Crypto Ransom Kidnapping
item.description: Elite French police rescued a mother and child after kidnappers targeted the family's crypto wealth in the latest “wrench attack.”

item.title: The 24-hour trap: Why the UK’s new crypto rules could catch some firms off guard
item.description: The new regulations revealed by the Financial Conduct Authority include several technical traps which crypto software providers need to watch for to avoid sanctions

item.title: Snap Cuts 1,000 Jobs, Aims to Save $500 Million as AI Reshapes Operations
item.description: Social media company Snap is restructuring operations to focus on profitability as AI tools reshape how teams work across key initiatives.

item.title: VerifiedX brings privacy layer to Bitcoin as institutional demand for confidentiality grows
item.description: A new zero-knowledge-powered system enables shielded bitcoin transactions, reflecting a broader push across crypto to address the “privacy gap” keeping institutions off public blockchains.

item.title: JUST IN: $12 trillion Charles Schwab to launch spot Bitcoin and Ethereum trading for retail clients "in the coming weeks." - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE5EOWRrN25tNi1MSUdsSWNZblJSem1jSExPQ1B6TFQ4SUNVbG5LZ2VfLWE2VjZvMVBmV0ZzSnpOcEw1ZnFSR2VDSjNyUnBidVZJb1NfclZfdGVhQkx3cmdMelBn?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: $12 trillion Charles Schw…

item.title: BREAKING: $12 trillion Charles Schwab to launch direct Bitcoin trading — CNBC 🚀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE8wV21wVlFQLTVnZkFIcXhQS2JHNlI3REhORDlSZUhnUkJqUVkwM0VwVGlMSmVnVlV6cHBXc3lzWTZfbDEyWjNDcElkMUNnOWFLaURoQjM0VEc1aUtMakllS2t6bG5iYms?oc=5" target="_blank">BREAKING: $12 trillion Char…

item.title: BREAKING: Charles Schwab announces the launch of direct trading of both Bitcoin and Ethereum to compete with Robinhood. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE0xbTdfc2N1ZkJxeDMzMWtFcjFWSjVaeG1xRzVUbHBmalNWMkxGdTlnMi1Ec1hnb2RoYkMtYXVRVVNFMmR6MlF5TzM5SUYwSEpDOVd0dDdTbDdVMkduRjNfV2JJdFpYUQ?oc=5" target="_blank">BREAKING: Charles Schwab ann…

item.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Ethereum (ETH) price drops 1.3% as index trades lower
item.description: Aave (AAVE), down 1.1% from Wednesday, was also an underperformer.

item.title: Wall Street trading-tech is coming to crypto as DoubleZero rolls out high-speed data for Solana
item.description: The project, called DoubleZero Edge, offers a real-time feed of raw data from the Solana blockchain, giving traders faster access to information that can influence prices.

item.title: Drift gets $148 million funding from Tether and partners as it replaces Circle stablecoin with USDT after massive exploit
item.description: The money will be used by Drift to recover user funds after more than $270 million in clients assets were exploited this month, and will relaunch the protocol as a USDT-based perpetuals DEX on Solana.

item.title: Bitcoin funding rates just hit their most negative level since 2023. This means traders are heavily short right now. Historically, extremes like this have marked local bottoms. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE5abFVaOHlRVG5fYnN2eVdvUTE0ZHlhVnlWek84VnFLTDNlTVNjSG5Zc1RaeW91dHB2T3NMNmlHeGwtRVVHOTVXMlZtMjNRMVdTVGtyQ25GbkU4RnVYSVdwUGxaM0pKQQ?oc=5" target="_blank">Bitcoin funding rates just h…

item.title: JUST IN: JPMorgan reports that the Bitcoin and crypto market structure legislation is 'close to completion' 👀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE82Um82THFPR3l6SGF4Zjl1VnRYcXZhUDBVeXh0X0xMdDlqWVRFOHY4Qi1OQUhQWkl3UDExNHN1UVZuR1VSU0FtejQtbE5fb3ZxQmZ6MmVXR3lzcHNMNTlYUlRKTHZ2ekU?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: JPMorgan reports t…
